title: ICSI Invites Feedback on IEPF Claims: A Crucial Update for Company Secretaries
content:
# ICSI Invites Feedback on IEPF Claims: A Crucial Update for Company Secretaries

Ek important update hai for all Company Secretaries! The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) ne Investor Education and Protection Fund (IEPF) claims se related practical difficulties par feedback invite kiya hai. This initiative, announced on March 10, 2026, aims to bridge the gap between regulatory authorities and stakeholders, ensuring a transparent and effective compliance process.

Here are the key details:

*   **What:** ICSI is seeking valuable inputs from Company Secretaries (both in practice and in employment) regarding challenges faced with the Investor Education and Protection Fund (IEPF) Authority.
*   **Why:** The objective is to understand the practical issues encountered during IEPF claim processes, gather structured inputs, and then present consolidated suggestions to the authorities to streamline procedures and enhance efficiency and compliance.
*   **How to Submit Feedback:** Professionals can submit their feedback by filling out an online Google Form.
*   **Due Date:** The last date to submit your responses is **March 17, 2026**.

Your timely feedback is crucial in helping the Institute make comprehensive representations to the authorities.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Check the official announcement on ICSI's "What's New" section](https://www.icsi.edu/home/whats-new-icsi/)

*Published on: 12 March 2026*
